headline: Tate Bros рҹҚҶрҹҡЁ Cuffed in US after UK Rape & Trafficking CHARGES рҹ’Ј
text: Andrew Tate рҹҘӢрҹ’Ә & lil bro Tristan рҹҚҶрҹ•¶пёҸ got SNATCHED by US Marshals рҹҰ…рҹ”’ after UK CPS dropped a FAT FILE рҹ“Ғрҹ’Ҙ of 7 new RAPE counts on Andrew plus SEX TRAFFICKING & CHILD PORN allegations рҹҚҶрҹ“ҪпёҸ! Tristan slaps on 1 SEXUAL ASSAULT, 2 RAPES & 3 TRAFFICKING counts рҹҡЁрҹҳ©. Alleged crimes went down July 2010-August 2017 рҹ—“пёҸрҹҚ· вҖ“ that's SEVEN alleged victims total рҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§ҚвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ! The brothers are dual British-US citizens рҹҮ¬рҹҮ§рҹҮәрҹҮё so CPS wants them EXTRADITED back to the UK like a bad Netflix show cancellation рҹ“әрҹҡ«. Lawyer Joseph McBride рҹ•ҙпёҸрҹ’ј swears 'the world knows they are INNOCENT' & calls the charges a 'POLITICAL HIT' рҹҺҜрҹӨЎ, saying enemies are trying to tank their US DEFAMATION lawsuit. US DOJ says the cuffs came 'pursuant to extradition proceedings' вҡ–пёҸрҹ“ң. Bedfordshire Police already had European arrest warrants from Romania рҹҸ°рҹҡЁ & the Tates lost their bid to ID the accusers рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ«. May 2025 list has 21 total charges, 2012-2016 era crimes рҹ”Ҙ. Tate boys say 'America does NOT do Britain's dirty work' рҹҰ…рҹ’Ә while the CPS says evidence is THICC рҹ“Ҳ. The saga keeps SERVING drama рҹҚҝрҹҳӯ вҖ“ will they WALK FREE or get the full UK treatment? рҹҚҶрҹ”—
